trigger.description: Feature Cards Group layout stability was not verified before content entry after BATCH-005.

affected_actions.reason: Text/content entry was attempted before Feature Cards Group layout controls were verified.

confirmed_work.description: Root, relative stage, and content layer were confirmed through BATCH-005.

still_valid_work.description: Root, relative stage, and content layer are still valid.
Feature card structure, visual core, and house asset remain valid; only pre-content layout stabilization is unresolved.

invalid_or_unverified_work.description: Text entry before layout stabilization is unverified and must not be treated as confirmed.
invalid_or_unverified_work.reason: Layout controls for Feature Cards Group were not checked before content entry.

rollback_required.reason: No rollback required; confirmed structure remains valid and only the affected action is blocked.

smallest_verified_repair_path.instruction: Select Smart Home Section / Feature Cards Group and verify Display, Direction, Wrap, Justify Content, Align Items, Width/Size, Height/Min Height, Position, Overflow, Gap, Padding, and Margin before any content entry.
smallest_verified_repair_path.allowed_scope: Feature Cards Group layout controls only.

smallest_verified_repair_path.instruction: If the UI does not expose one of those controls, mark it as not_visible_in_current_ui or requires_screenshot_confirmation; do not invent a value.

evidence_required.request: Screenshot showing Feature Cards Group selected, active class visible, and layout controls/panel state.

required_screenshot.target: affected element and relevant control panel

root_fix_required.reason: Incident exposes a root pipeline gap that needs repository-level enforcement.
